content.text:
{"success":true,"process_rule_id":"J09B","process_rule":"1. Make a copy of decision_table with TOURS starting with J09B named J09B_temp
2. Update the table with an additional empty column ENTSCHEIDUNG
3. Apply the following rules to the joined table:
   1. Count the number of EQUNR for every HAUS and set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA" if there are less than 3 EQUNR. ELSE set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU"
   2. Set all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 of 0 to "EVU"
4. Join this table with the EABLG table using INSTALLATION
5. Join this table with the NET_MASTER table and the SALES_MASTER table using EQUNR
6. Compare sales data and net data for these IDs:
   - If sales data is there, take sales data and empty net data
   - Otherwise stay with net data and empty sales data
7. Export the final data from the table as CSV file named J09B including the columns: Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No., HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1, CITY1, CITY2, EMAIL
8. Send them to the EVU team to meter.readings@evu.com
9. Delete the temporary table after exporting the data."}

structured_content.process_rule:
1. Make a copy of decision_table with TOURS starting with J09B named J09B_temp
2. Update the table with an additional empty column ENTSCHEIDUNG
3. Apply the following rules to the joined table:
   1. Count the number of EQUNR for every HAUS and set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA" if there are less than 3 EQUNR. ELSE set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU"
   2. Set all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 of 0 to "EVU"
4. Join this table with the EABLG table using INSTALLATION
5. Join this table with the NET_MASTER table and the SALES_MASTER table using EQUNR
6. Compare sales data and net data for these IDs:
   - If sales data is there, take sales data and empty net data
   - Otherwise stay with net data and empty sales data
7. Export the final data from the table as CSV file named J09B including the columns: Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No., HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1, CITY1, CITY2, EMAIL
8. Send them to the EVU team to meter.readings@evu.com
9. Delete the temporary table after exporting the data.

args.sqlite_command: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09B_temp; CREATE TABLE J09B_temp AS SELECT * FROM decision_table WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09B%'; ALTER TABLE J09B_temp ADD COLUMN ENTSCHEIDUNG TEXT; UPDATE J09B_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = CASE WHEN HOUSE_NUM1 = 0 THEN 'EVU' WHEN (SELECT COUNT(EQUNR) FROM J09B_temp t2 WHERE t2.HAUS = J09B_temp.HAUS) < 3 THEN 'KSA' ELSE 'EVU' END; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09B_final; CREATE TABLE J09B_final AS SELECT e."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", t.HAUS, t.ANLAGE, t.ME_MA_ID, t.EQUNR, t.HOUSE_NUM1, t.ENTSCHEIDUNG, COALESCE(s.TITLE, n.TITLE) AS TITLE, COALESCE(s.FORENAME, n.FORENAME) AS FORENAME, COALESCE(s.SURNAME, n.SURNAME) AS SURNAME, COALESCE(s.STREET, n.STREET) AS STREET, COALESCE(s.STREETNO, n.STREETNO) AS STREETNO, COALESCE(s.POST_CODE1, n.POST_CODE1) AS POST_CODE1, COALESCE(s.CITY1, n.CITY1) AS CITY1, COALESCE(s.CITY2, n.CITY2) AS CITY2, COALESCE(s.EMAIL, n.EMAIL) AS EMAIL FROM J09B_temp t LEFT JOIN eablg e ON t.ANLAGE = e.Installation LEFT JOIN net_master n ON t.EQUNR = n.EQUNR LEFT JOIN sales_master s ON t.EQUNR = s.EQUNR;

args.sqlite_command: CREATE TABLE J09B_temp AS SELECT * FROM decision_table WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09B%'
ALTER TABLE J09B_temp ADD COLUMN ENTSCHEIDUNG TEXT
UPDATE J09B_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = CASE WHEN HOUSE_NUM1 = 0 THEN 'EVU' WHEN (SELECT COUNT(EQUNR) FROM J09B_temp t2 WHERE t2.HAUS = J09B_temp.HAUS) < 3 THEN 'KSA' ELSE 'EVU' END

CREATE TABLE J09B_final AS SELECT e."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", t.HAUS, t.ANLAGE, t.ME_MA_ID, t.EQUNR, t.HOUSE_NUM1, t.ENTSCHEIDUNG, COALESCE(s.TITLE, n.TITLE) AS TITLE, COALESCE(s.FORENAME, n.FORENAME) AS FORENAME, COALESCE(s.SURNAME, n.SURNAME) AS SURNAME, COALESCE(s.STREET, n.STREET) AS STREET, COALESCE(s.STREETNO, n.STREETNO) AS STREETNO, COALESCE(s.POST_CODE1, n.POST_CODE1) AS POST_CODE1, COALESCE(s.CITY1, n.CITY1) AS CITY1, COALESCE(s.CITY2, n.CITY2) AS CITY2, COALESCE(s.EMAIL, n.EMAIL) AS EMAIL FROM J09B_temp t LEFT JOIN eablg e ON t.ANLAGE = e.Installation LEFT JOIN net_master n ON t.EQUNR = n.EQUNR LEFT JOIN sales_master s ON t.EQUNR = s.EQUNR

args.sql_query: SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1, CITY1, CITY2, EMAIL FROM J09B_final

Process J09B completed successfully.

- Exported CSV: `J09B.csv`
